calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:41am and concluding at 9:54am.

Plaintiff United Rentals (North America) Inc. appearing represented by Robert Cohen, Esq. via zoom.
Defendants All Elements Services Inc. and Daniele Gozzi not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and custodian of records CALLAN MINSTER and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff United Rentals Inc., and against Defendants All Elements Services, Inc. and Daniele Gozzi, as follows:

Damages: $115,932.35
Prejudgment Interest: $39,762.04
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $871.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $159,390.39

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
